name: Normal Operations
description: Standard matchday operations. Gates open, normal crowd levels, no incidents.

name: Gate C Structural Blockage
description: Gate C (East Entrance) is temporarily closed due to an access path obstruction. Fans are redirected to Gates B or D.

active_incidents.title: Gate C Obstruction
active_incidents.message: Gate C is closed. Please use Gate B or Gate D.

name: Gate A Security Overload
description: Heavy visitor influx at Gate A (North) causes security lines to surge to 25 minutes. Fans are advised to use Gate H or B.

active_incidents.title: Gate A Crowding
active_incidents.message: Gate A is facing high wait times (25 mins). Recommended alternatives: Gate H or B.

name: North Concourse Bottleneck
description: Sudden crowd buildup in the North Lower Concourse near Food Stall L1. Rerouting rules will divert fans via East or West concourses.

active_incidents.title: Concourse Bottleneck
active_incidents.message: Heavy congestion on lower North concourse. Consider walking via South side.

name: Food Stall L2 Shut Down
description: Food Stall L2 (Lower East) closed due to technical faults. AI will redirect hungry fans to Food Stall L3 or L1.

active_incidents.title: Food Counter Maintenance
active_incidents.message: Food Stall L2 is closed for maintenance. Closest alternatives: L1 or L3.

name: Post-Match Gate E & F Congestion
description: Post-match public transport delays create a major bottleneck at Southern exits. Fans are advised to exit through Northern gates.

active_incidents.title: Transport Exit Congestion
active_incidents.message: Severe congestion at Southern Gates E & F. Please exit using Gate A, B, or H.
